title: The Crickets Who Misplaced Their Evening Song

audioFiles.label: Episode 1
audioFiles.title: The Crickets Who Misplaced Their Evening Song
audioFiles.description: Nori helps a tiny cricket orchestra rebuild a missing piece of their twilight song so the stars can return in calm, glowing order.

voiceNotes: Use EN - Jane, Curious style for this series. Long-term preference is to create a dedicated saved Mistral voice_id for Nori once a clean reference sample is approved.
